noticia.titulo: Who, What, Where, When, Huh??? Jeff VanderMeer’s “Corpse Mouth and Spore Nose”
noticia.texto_resumido: Cosmic horror includes a long and noble tradition of spooky fungus — and it’s never good news for the humans. The post Who, What, Where, When, Huh??? Jeff VanderMeer’s “Corpse Mouth and Spore Nose” appeared first on Reactor .
